title: SKRUSDT short setup 2026-06-27 (triangle breakdown)
body:
📉 SHORT SETUP — SKRUSDT (Bitunix · 15m)
ID: SKR-S-20260627

Structure: after an extended push up, price is coiling into a tightening triangle and stalling under descending resistance. A break below the rising support flips the short-term structure bearish — that's the trigger.

🔻 Bias: Short on the breakdown
🎯 Entry zone: 0.00865 – 0.00872 (into resistance / on the break of support)
🛑 Invalidation (SL): 0.00895 — above the swing highs
🎯 Targets: TP1 0.00840 · TP2 0.00820 · TP3 0.00800

Manage your own size — this is a 15m idea: fast timeframe, keep risk tight and move your stop as it works. An idea to study, not a trade to copy blindly.

#Signal
